uplink.description: Status report (TTN example bytes; report type 0x01)
Status report, positive temperature with humidity at full scale (synthetic, in-bounds)
uplink._note: expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (battery 0x1e=30 -> 3.0 V; temp 0x00c8=200 -> 2.00 C; humidity 0x2710=10000 -> 100.00 %), then normalized to vocabulary keys

uplink.description: Status report, low-battery flag set (synthetic, in-bounds)
uplink._note: expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (battery 0x9a -> low-battery bit set, 0x1a=26 -> 2.6 V; temp 0x012c=300 -> 3.00 C; humidity 0x1170=4464 -> 44.64 %). Upstream emits Volt as the string '2.6(low battery)'; we surface battery as a number plus the camelCase extra lowBattery
expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (temp 0xffec=65516 two's-complement -> -0.20 C; humidity 0x0bb8=3000 -> 30.00 %)

uplink.description: Status report, humidity at zero (synthetic, in-bounds)
uplink._note: expected.data computed by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input (battery 0x20=32 -> 3.2 V; temp 0 -> 0.00 C; humidity 0 -> 0.00 %)

uplink.description: Startup version report carries no measurement (TTN example bytes; report type 0x00)
Configure report response on fPort 7 is unsupported (TTN example bytes)
